title: Select the Correct Axis Controls for Left or Right Tipper Jogging
summary: Use the documented operator station axis mapping to choose the correct A and Z axis pair before jogging a tote position. The source states that A1 and Z1 are used for the left axis, and A2 and Z2 are used for the right tipper.
when_to_use: Use this reference when working at the operator station HMI to select the correct axis controls before jogging for tote repositioning or manual jog mode tasks where the screen shows Z1 Axis, Z2 Axis, A1 Axis, and A2 Axis.
not_for: Do not use undocumented axis mappings.
Do not use this runbook as a complete jogging or fault-recovery procedure; the source here provides axis assignment only.

responsibilities: Identify whether the intended jog action is for the left axis or the right tipper.
Verify the selected on-screen axis labels match the documented mapping before jogging.

safety_notes: Use only the documented axis assignment from the source.
If the screen labeling is unclear, stop and escalate rather than using an undocumented mapping.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the operator station HMI
Visibility of Z1 Axis, Z2 Axis, A1 Axis, and A2 Axis labels

access_required: Operator access to the operator station HMI
system_preconditions: The operator station screen is available and shows the axis labels Z1 Axis, Z2 Axis, A1 Axis, and A2 Axis.
external_references: OptiSweep Operation and Maintenance Manual, section 5.7.1 Non-Recoverable Fault—Operator Station Motors

visual_references.description: Operator station HMI view showing manual mode axis controls and RESET in the MCP_Dual context.
Operator station screen snippet showing axis controls including Z1 Axis, Z2 Axis, A1 Axis, and A2 Axis.
Manual jog mode interface example used when clearing operator station motor faults and repositioning a tote.
Manual jog mode reference showing the interface context where axis selection is used.
Operator station HMI screen for manually jogging the tipper axes, including left and right axis controls.

steps.title: Open the operator station screen and locate the axis labels
steps.purpose: Confirm that the operator is viewing the screen that contains the documented axis labels used for jog selection.
steps.instruction: Open the operator station MCP_Dual screen and locate the axis labels Z1 Axis, Z2 Axis, A1 Axis, and A2 Axis.
steps.expected_result: The operator station screen displays the four axis labels needed for selection.
steps.healthy_condition: Z1 Axis, Z2 Axis, A1 Axis, and A2 Axis are visible on the operator station screen.
steps.failure_condition: The required axis labels are not visible or the screen labeling is unclear.

actions.label: Locate axis labels
actions.exact_action: Open the operator station MCP_Dual screen and locate the axis labels Z1 Axis, Z2 Axis, A1 Axis, and A2 Axis.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Manual mode axis controls on the operator station HMI, including Z1 Axis, Z2 Axis, A1 Axis, and A2 Axis.
Screen snippet showing the axis labels and control layout.
HMI view showing the four axis labels in the operator station screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: The screen does not show Z1 Axis, Z2 Axis, A1 Axis, and A2 Axis.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The display shows Z1 Axis, Z2 Axis, A2 Axis, and A1 Axis.

steps.title: Identify whether the jog action is for the left axis or right tipper
steps.purpose: Determine which documented axis pair must be selected.
steps.instruction: Identify whether the jog action is being performed for the left axis or the right tipper.
steps.expected_result: The operator has determined whether the intended jog target is the left axis or the right tipper.
steps.healthy_condition: The intended side is clearly identified before any axis selection is made.
steps.failure_condition: The operator cannot determine whether the jog target is the left axis or the right tipper.

actions.label: Determine jog side
actions.exact_action: Identify whether the jog action is being performed for the left axis or the right tipper.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Left and right tipper axis control groupings on the manual jogging screen.
Manual jog mode interface context where the axis selection is applied.

stop_or_escalate_if: It is not clear whether the jog action is for the left axis or the right tipper.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: NOTE: Use A1 and Z1 for the left axis; use A2 and Z2 for the right tipper.

steps.title: Select A1 and Z1 for the left axis
steps.purpose: Apply the documented left-side axis mapping from the source.
steps.instruction: For the left axis, select A1 and Z1 as the documented controls.
steps.expected_result: The left-axis jog selection uses A1 and Z1.
steps.healthy_condition: A1 and Z1 are selected when the jog action is for the left axis.
steps.failure_condition: Any axis pair other than A1 and Z1 is selected for the left axis.

actions.label: Select left-axis controls
actions.exact_action: For the left axis, select A1 and Z1 as the documented controls.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: A1 AXIS and Z1 AXIS controls associated with the left tipper.
Manual jog mode interface showing A1 and Z1 among the available axis labels.

stop_or_escalate_if: A1 and Z1 are not available for selection when the left axis is intended.
The screen labeling does not support confirming the left-axis assignment.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: NOTE: Use A1 and Z1 for the left axis; use A2 and Z2 for the right tipper.

steps.title: Select A2 and Z2 for the right tipper
steps.purpose: Apply the documented right-side axis mapping from the source.
steps.instruction: For the right tipper, select A2 and Z2 as the documented controls.
steps.expected_result: The right-tipper jog selection uses A2 and Z2.
steps.healthy_condition: A2 and Z2 are selected when the jog action is for the right tipper.
steps.failure_condition: Any axis pair other than A2 and Z2 is selected for the right tipper.

actions.label: Select right-tipper controls
actions.exact_action: For the right tipper, select A2 and Z2 as the documented controls.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: A2 AXIS and Z2 AXIS controls associated with the right tipper.
Manual jog mode interface showing A2 and Z2 among the available axis labels.

stop_or_escalate_if: A2 and Z2 are not available for selection when the right tipper is intended.
The screen labeling does not support confirming the right-tipper assignment.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: NOTE: Use A1 and Z1 for the left axis; use A2 and Z2 for the right tipper.

steps.title: Verify the selected axis labels match the documented assignment before jogging
steps.purpose: Prevent jogging with an incorrect or undocumented axis mapping.
steps.instruction: Before jogging, verify that the selected axis labels on the screen match the documented left or right assignment.
steps.expected_result: The selected axis pair matches the documented mapping for the intended side before any jog movement is performed.
steps.healthy_condition: Left-axis work uses A1 and Z1, or right-tipper work uses A2 and Z2, and the screen labels clearly confirm that selection.
steps.failure_condition: The selected labels do not match the documented assignment, or the screen labeling cannot be confirmed.

actions.label: Verify selected axis pair
actions.exact_action: Before jogging, verify that the selected axis labels on the screen match the documented left or right assignment.

Manual jog mode reference showing the axis labels and jog context.

stop_or_escalate_if: The selected axis labels do not match the documented assignment.
Only an undocumented mapping appears possible.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: NOTE: Use A1 and Z1 for the left axis; use A2 and Z2 for the right tipper.
The display shows Z1 Axis, Z2 Axis, A2 Axis, and A1 Axis.

success_criteria: The operator selects the documented A and Z axis pair that matches the intended left axis or right tipper.
The on-screen labels are verified before jogging.
No undocumented axis mapping is used.
healthy_conditions: Z1 Axis, Z2 Axis, A1 Axis, and A2 Axis are visible on the operator station screen.
Left-axis selection uses A1 and Z1.
Right-tipper selection uses A2 and Z2.
The selected axis labels match the documented assignment before jogging.
failure_conditions: The required axis labels are not visible on the screen.
The operator cannot determine whether the jog action is for the left axis or the right tipper.
The selected axis pair does not match the documented mapping.
An undocumented axis mapping would be required.
escalation_guidance: Stop and escalate if the screen labeling is unclear.
Stop and escalate if the required axis labels are not visible.
Stop and escalate if the intended left/right assignment cannot be determined from the available source-backed information.
Do not proceed using undocumented axis mappings.

missing_details: The source does not define how to determine left versus right beyond the stated mapping.
The source does not provide additional correction steps if the screen labeling is unclear.
The source does not provide a time estimate for this reference procedure.
The source does not state whether production stop or LOTO is required for this reference activity.
